issues.detail: The draft states "MINUTA — CARECE DE REVISÃO POR ADVOGADO", but the source document does not contain any information about a lawyer's review stamp.
Draft claims an "obligation to renew the Agreement" per clause 11.2, but the source document is a non‑renewal notice indicating Baltic Freight intends NOT to renew.
Statement that the draft lacks lawyer review is not supported by the source document or the computed record
The draft states 'MINUTA — CARECE DE REVISÃO POR ADVOGADO', which is not supported by the source document or the computed record.
The claim that the draft lacks lawyer review is not supported by the source document or the computed record
The draft includes the statement "MINUTA — CARECE DE REVISÃO POR ADVOGADO", which is not mentioned in the source document.
The draft states "MINUTA — CARECE DE REVISÃO POR ADVOGADO", a claim about the document's review status that is not supported by the source document or the computed record.

The draft states the Notice of Preliminary Findings is dated 15 February 2026, but the source document only indicates that the notice was deemed received on that date; the actual date of the notice is not provided.
The statement "MINUTA — CARECE DE REVISÃO POR ADVOGADO" is not supported by either the source document or the computed record.
Draft states it lacks lawyer review ("MINUTA — CARECE DE REVISÃO POR ADVOGADO"), but the source document and computed record contain no information about any review stamp.
The draft’s header date (2026-09-15) is not present in the source document or the computed record.
